

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Homematic(IP) local** is a custom integration and is **not maintained by the Home Assistant project**.

## Bug Reports

Please open an issue in the responsible repository:
**[https://github.com/SukramJ/aiohomematic](https://github.com/SukramJ/aiohomematic)**

> [!NOTE]
> Issues without the requested information cannot be processed.

## Updates

Custom integrations are **not included or updated by Home Assistant** itself.
Updates must be applied either **manually** or via **[HACS](https://hacs.xyz)**.
